patterns.message: Upslope event Day 2: S/SE wind at 123°, humidity 72%, temp -6°C. Enhanced orographic snowfall likely.
Close to warming concern: Freezing level rising to 1928m (threshold 2000m).
Cold snap Day 9: 6°C drop to -9°C. Great for powder preservation.
